name: Turkey Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except garnishes together.
2. Fry a small amount of the mixture in a skillet and taste. Adjust seasonings to your personal taste.
3. Place the mixture in a pan that fits into a slow cooker or a 2 lb. coffee can or baking dish if using a round slow cooker.
4. Place a trivet in the bottom of the cooker and place the pan on the trivet.
5. Set the cooker on for 7 to 8 hours, adjusting cooking time as necessary based on the shape of the pan.
6. Ensure there is no pink left in the meat when it is done properly.
7. Drain off any visible fat.
8. If desired, add a thin layer of sour cream and sprinkle with a few capers before serving.
